close_reason: Subsumed by fz-ul4.11.31. The root walker .11.31 needs per-frame FzValue-slot information; ir_liveness::analyze_module either becomes its source (option A) or is replaced by leaner per-fn computation inside .11.31's schema audit (option B). Decision lands inside .11.31 implementation, not standalone.
description:
GOAL: Wire src/ir_liveness.rs into ir_codegen, or delete it.

Status when authored: discovered during fz-ul4.11.15 research (2026-05-11)
that ir_liveness::analyze_module is dead code — it's only called from its
own tests. ir_codegen builds frame schemas independently from entry-block
param count (codegen.rs:1473-1480) and never reads FnIr.frame_schema_id.

## Two paths to evaluate

  A. Wire it in.
     ir_liveness builds a richer schema: [cont_ptr, live_var_0, live_var_1,
     ...] where the live set is the union of all Cont.captured across outgoing
     Call/CallClosure terms. This would let ir_codegen put cross-call live
     values directly in the frame instead of relying on Cranelift's
     spill/reload. Potential perf win for fns with many call sites.

  B. Delete it.
     If we don't need the richer schema (Cranelift's regalloc handles it
     fine), remove src/ir_liveness.rs entirely and the associated tests.
     Less code to maintain.

## Investigation needed

  - Benchmark a few cont-heavy programs with current codegen vs a prototype
    that respects liveness-frame schemas. If perf wins are meaningful, do
    (A); else do (B).
  - Note: this interacts with fz-ul4.11.15.5's inliner placement — inlining
    runs BEFORE typer, which runs before any liveness-aware codegen. Fine
    either way.

## Acceptance

  - One commit referencing fz-ul4.11.29.
  - Either: ir_codegen consumes FnIr.frame_schema_id and tests verify
    per-fn schemas contain live-var slots; OR: src/ir_liveness.rs is
    deleted and the relevant tests are deleted/migrated.

## References

  - src/ir_liveness.rs (the dead-code module).
  - src/ir_codegen.rs:1470-1480 (current entry-param-only schema builder).
title: Wire ir_liveness into codegen (or delete)
